description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Friday, January 12th, a Nuro Prius operating autonomously was stopped at a red light at the intersection of Shoreline and Terra Bella 
Ave. A Mazda approaching the intersection failed to completely stop and rear-ended the Nuro Prius. No injuries were reported. Both 
vehicles sustained minor damage. 
Print
Clear Form
